summary: Birthday Campaign Triggers feature verified. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: Date Triggers page with 'Include Birthday Card' toggle visible and functional. The toggle has a pink gift icon (#FF6B8A) and defaults to ON. Both scheduler and tag-based birthday card creation work correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Page shows infinite spinner when accessed directly via URL. Works correctly when navigating via More > Communication > Date Triggers

critical_code_review_comments: DateTriggerConfig model at line 44 correctly includes 'include_birthday_card: Optional[bool] = True' field
Process endpoint (line 253) correctly checks config.get('include_birthday_card', True) before creating cards
Scheduler at line 234 also respects include_birthday_card setting
Tags router at lines 392-400 triggers birthday card creation for birthday/bday tags
Frontend date-triggers.tsx correctly shows 'Include Birthday Card' toggle only for Birthday trigger (line 259)
Toggle uses pink accent color (#FF6B8A) with gift icon
seed_data_creation: Test contacts with 'TEST_' prefix created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birthday Campaign Trigger integration verified. Key findings: (1) PUT /api/date-triggers/{user_id}/config/birthday accepts include_birthday_card boolean, (2) GET config returns it, (3) POST /api/date-triggers/{user_id}/process creates birthday cards when include_birthday_card is true, (4) POST /api/tags/{user_id}/assign with 'birthday', 'Birthday', or 'bday' tag triggers auto_create_birthday_card, (5) Frontend has Include Birthday Card toggle in Date Triggers page under More > Communication > Date Triggers, (6) Toggle has pink gift icon and defaults to ON.

verified: Defaults to true when not provided
bday tag also triggers card creation
Only appears for Birthday trigger (not Anniversary or Sold Date)
Description text: Auto-generates a personalized birthday card with a shareable link appended to your message
